title: StarRocks
excerpt: description: Connect StarRocks to R2 Data Catalog to query and modify Iceberg tables. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Below is an example of using [StarRocks ↗](https://docs.starrocks.io/docs/data%5Fsource/catalog/iceberg/iceberg%5Fcatalog/#rest) to connect, query, modify data from R2 Data Catalog (read-write). * Sign up for a [Cloudflare account ↗](https://dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up/workers-and-pages).
